item.eclipse.vitae_shard.full: Your vessel already holds seven hearts.
item.eclipse.vitae_shard.used: A heart takes root — %s now beat within you.
shop.eclipse.deposit_hint: Sneak-use to bank shards; sneak-punch to buy the shown offer.
shop.eclipse.offer: Altar shop: %1$s — %2$s shards (you have %3$s). Sneak-punch to buy.
shop.eclipse.offer_pooled: Altar shop: %1$s — %2$s POOLED shards (pool holds %3$s). Sneak-punch to call it.
shop.eclipse.need: The altar demands %1$s shards; you banked only %2$s.
shop.eclipse.pool_need: The pool holds %2$s of the %1$s shards this demands.
gui.eclipse.title.disclaimer: Unofficial community event mod · Not affiliated with Mojang
gui.eclipse.settings.title: Eclipse Settings
gui.eclipse.settings.subtitle: Cosmetic client options · saved immediately
gui.eclipse.artifact.title: Project Eclipse
gui.eclipse.artifact.goals.none: No goals received yet — the server will sync them shortly.
gui.eclipse.artifact.rules.title: Rules of the Eclipse
gui.eclipse.artifact.rules.line1: 1. Every player has a limited number of lives. When your last life is lost, your soul is banned from the world until other players revive you at the altar.
gui.eclipse.artifact.rules.line2: 2. Everyone is anonymous: chat, name tags, the tab list, signs, books and anvil naming are sealed. Speak only through the proximity voice chat.
gui.eclipse.artifact.rules.line3: 3. The event runs in days. Each day brings three goals, new unlocks and a larger world border. Check this menu every day.
gui.eclipse.artifact.rules.line4: 4. Parts of your inventory, workstations, dimensions and entire mods stay sealed until the matching day or altar milestone unlocks them.
gui.eclipse.artifact.rules.line5: 5. The altar accepts offerings. Completing a milestone raises the altar level and unlocks new powers for everybody.
gui.eclipse.artifact.rules.line6: 6. You may sacrifice one of your own lives at the altar; the heart fragment it yields is an ingredient for reviving banned players.
gui.eclipse.artifact.rules.line7: 7. Graves protect a fallen player's items for a grace period. Do not touch a fresh grave that is not yours.
gui.eclipse.artifact.rules.line8: 8. The arm artifact is bound to you: it cannot be dropped, stored or moved from the rightmost hotbar slot. Right-click it (or press J) to open this menu.
gui.eclipse.artifact.rules.line9: 9. Teaming, alliances and betrayal are allowed — griefing spawn and exploiting bugs are not.
gui.eclipse.artifact.rules.line10: 10. Admin decisions are final. Report issues on the event Discord instead of arguing in game.
gui.eclipse.handbook.title: The Ledger of the Drowned
gui.eclipse.handbook.hint: 1–6 / arrow keys turn the pages · %s closes the ledger
gui.eclipse.handbook.timeline.empty: The spine is still blank — the server will sync it shortly.
gui.eclipse.handbook.rewards.none: The altar's demands have not been revealed yet — the server will sync them shortly.
gui.eclipse.goaleditor.title: Goal Editor — days.json
gui.eclipse.goaleditor.too_large: Edit exceeds 64 KB — trim it down.
bestiary.eclipse.deckhand.name: Deckhand
bestiary.eclipse.deckhand.lore: Mute rowers of the ghost ship. They pulled us through the black water once, and they will keep rowing long after we are gone. They never look up — pray they never do.
bestiary.eclipse.gazer.name: Gazer
bestiary.eclipse.gazer.lore: A hooded shape at the edge of the torchlight. It only watches. Meet its gaze and it is gone — but never far, and never for long.
bestiary.eclipse.the_other.name: The Other
bestiary.eclipse.the_other.lore: On pale nights it walks among us wearing our uniform. It moves like a friend, stops like a friend, stares like nothing human. Check the eyes before you turn your back.
bestiary.eclipse.umbral_stalker.name: Umbral Stalker
bestiary.eclipse.umbral_stalker.lore: Obsidian-furred pack hunters with shards of violet light along the spine. Where one growls, three more circle. Dawn is your only ally.
bestiary.eclipse.herald.name: The Herald of the Eclipse
bestiary.eclipse.herald.lore: A broken godhead of black glass and corona shards, sent ahead of the eclipse to weigh us. Its core is the key the altar hungers for.
bestiary.eclipse.ferryman.name: The Ferryman
bestiary.eclipse.ferryman.lore: He rows the drowned to the far shore and takes his toll in souls. On the last day the ship sails again — pay him in defiance, and everyone comes home.
message.eclipse.sanctum_protected: The Sanctum of the Occluded Sun rejects your touch.
message.eclipse.goals_updated: %s saved — config reloaded and re-synced to all players.
message.eclipse.goals_denied: Config edit rejected: permission level 3 required.
ritual.eclipse.altar.wrong_item: The altar does not desire this.
ritual.eclipse.heart.confirm: Sneak-use again within 5s to sacrifice a life.
ritual.eclipse.heart.blocked: You cannot sacrifice your last life.
ritual.eclipse.revive.no_selection: Choose a soul first (use the sigil without sneaking).
ritual.eclipse.revive.already_running: A ritual is already in progress here.
ritual.eclipse.lure.sneak_hint: Sneak and use the lure to call the Herald down.
ritual.eclipse.lure.day: The lure only answers after dusk.
ritual.eclipse.lure.already: The Herald already looms over the sanctum.
announce.eclipse.herald.title: THE HERALD FALLS
announce.eclipse.herald.sub: Its core is yours — the altar hungers for it.
ritual.eclipse.finale.day: The ship will not sail before the last day.
ritual.eclipse.finale.dusk: The crossing only begins after dusk.
ritual.eclipse.finale.already: The Ferryman is already waiting on his deck.
ritual.eclipse.lantern.ghost_only: Only the dead may tend these flames.
announce.eclipse.ferryman.victory.title: THE CROSSING ENDS
announce.eclipse.ferryman.victory.sub: The toll is paid in defiance — everyone comes home.
announce.eclipse.ferryman.wipe.title: THE ECLIPSE PREVAILS
announce.eclipse.ferryman.wipe.sub: The ship sails on with every soul aboard.
announce.eclipse.day.1.title: DAY 1 — FIRST LIGHT
announce.eclipse.day.1.sub: Day 1. Survive the night — the eclipse is watching.
announce.eclipse.day.2.title: DAY 2 — THE BURNING DOOR
announce.eclipse.day.2.sub: Day 2. The nether gate groans open early — and your packs with it.
announce.eclipse.day.3.title: DAY 3 — MACHINES IN THE DARK
announce.eclipse.day.3.sub: Day 3. Workstations hum; contraptions may turn.
announce.eclipse.day.4.title: DAY 4 — THE FEAST
announce.eclipse.day.4.sub: Day 4. Armor up and set the table — trust is cooked, not given.
announce.eclipse.day.5.title: DAY 5 — SKYWARD
announce.eclipse.day.5.sub: Day 5. The sky opens for the daring.
announce.eclipse.day.6.title: DAY 6 — FORTRESS
announce.eclipse.day.6.sub: Day 6. Find the fortress. Craft the lure. Dusk tomorrow decides.
announce.eclipse.day.7.title: DAY 7 — THE HERALD
announce.eclipse.day.7.sub: Day 7. At dusk it descends. Enchanting belongs to its killers.
announce.eclipse.day.8.title: DAY 8 — THE HOARD
announce.eclipse.day.8.sub: Day 8. Ender chests keep what you cannot.
announce.eclipse.day.9.title: DAY 9 — ALCHEMY AND VOLTAGE
announce.eclipse.day.9.sub: Day 9. Cauldrons bubble; machines crackle awake.
announce.eclipse.day.10.title: DAY 10 — DEEP RUIN
announce.eclipse.day.10.sub: Day 10. Netherite awaits the patient smith.
announce.eclipse.day.11.title: DAY 11 — THE WEAKEST LINK
announce.eclipse.day.11.sub: Day 11. A chain is judged by its weakest link.
announce.eclipse.day.12.title: DAY 12 — STRONGHOLD
announce.eclipse.day.12.sub: Day 12. The end portal hums beneath the stone.
announce.eclipse.day.13.title: DAY 13 — THE DRAGON
announce.eclipse.day.13.sub: Day 13. Bring the dragon down and claim the egg.
announce.eclipse.day.14.title: DAY 14 — THE FERRYMAN
announce.eclipse.day.14.sub: Day 14. Gather. The ship sails at dusk.
announce.eclipse.day.generic.title: A NEW DAY DAWNS
announce.eclipse.day.generic.sub: A new day dawns over the drowned world.
announce.eclipse.unlock.title: SEAL BROKEN
announce.eclipse.unlock.key.main_invento: Seal broken: your full inventory is restored.
announce.eclipse.unlock.key.workbenches: Seal broken: workstations may be used.
announce.eclipse.unlock.key.create: Seal broken: Create contraptions are permitted.
announce.eclipse.unlock.key.armor: Seal broken: armor may be worn.
announce.eclipse.unlock.key.simulated: Seal broken: simulated districts come online.
announce.eclipse.unlock.key.aeronautics: Seal broken: airships may take flight.
announce.eclipse.unlock.key.nether: Seal broken: the nether accepts visitors.
announce.eclipse.unlock.key.ender_chests: Seal broken: ender chests open their void.
announce.eclipse.unlock.key.brewing: Seal broken: brewing stands bubble to life.
announce.eclipse.unlock.key.smithing: Seal broken: smithing templates may be used.
announce.eclipse.unlock.key.sable: Seal broken: the sable arts are yours.
announce.eclipse.unlock.key.farmersdelig: Seal broken: the feast may be cooked.
announce.eclipse.unlock.key.supplementar: Seal broken: rigging and contrivances are permitted.
announce.eclipse.unlock.key.sophisticate: Seal broken: backpacks may be carried.
announce.eclipse.unlock.key.createadditi: Seal broken: electricity hums through the machines.
announce.eclipse.milestone.title: THE ALTAR ASCENDS
announce.eclipse.milestone.1: The altar reaches level 1 — its first hunger sated.
announce.eclipse.milestone.2: The altar reaches level 2 — gold sings in its veins.
announce.eclipse.milestone.3: The altar reaches level 3 — diamonds feed the flame.
announce.eclipse.milestone.4: The altar reaches level 4 — pearls whisper of the void.
announce.eclipse.milestone.5: The altar reaches level 5 — it hungers no more.
announce.eclipse.goal.title: GOAL COMPLETE
announce.eclipse.night.pale.title: PALE NIGHT
announce.eclipse.night.pale.sub: Something wearing your face walks the dark.
announce.eclipse.night.umbral.title: UMBRAL NIGHT
announce.eclipse.night.umbral.sub: The packs run double tonight. Stay in the light.
announce.eclipse.stage.title: THE WORLD GROWS
announce.eclipse.stage.overworld: The ring has widened — new lands break the waves.
announce.eclipse.stage.nether: The nether disc swells beneath the crust.
